summary: Other specific effects of each type of wound

mechanics.name_guess: Other specific effects of each type of wound
mechanics.breadcrumb_path: Rules Compendium > Page 117 > npcs > Other specific effects of each type of wound
mechanics.excerpt: Other specific effects of each type of wound are described in the following sections_ Glass Jaw: Characters with the Glass Jaw Trait add to the wound value of all wounds except the Fatigue Only result, which still has value of Pain Reslstance: Characters with Pain Resistance are not stunned by Grazing Wounds, and the total TN modifiers for all wounds taken by the character are reduced by For example_ character with Pain Resistance who has suffered Minor Wounds and Serious Wound would have total TN modifier of rather than +4 Toughness: Characters with the Toughness Trait reduce the wourid value ot all wounds by This has no effect on the wound value increases from bleeding: Knockout the character suffers Serious Wound Or worse, he might be overcome by pain or shock and knocked out.
